notes: Crash on start-up. Tried disable ESYNC, disable D3D11 and use D3D11. Nothing worked.
title: Daylight

notes: Runs perfectly after creating a ".config" file with content "pass" in the game root directory. eg. 1. open terminal in game directory 2. do "echo 'pass' >.config"  and that's it. Game should now start without problems.
title: Daylight

notes:
You need to create a .config file with the content "pass" as some other user described. After that the game starts without any issues.

It can be done this way:
cd /SteamLibrary/steamapps/common/Daylight (adjust this path)
echo 'pass' > .config
title: Daylight
